page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64-based compute-optimized server instance powered by the custom Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, requiring external block storage solutions, while network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core capabilities. The YiTian710 processor achieves a strong multi-core stress-ng CPU score of 57749.33 and a strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 267.02 GB/sec, placing it in the top 25% of tested hardware. Single-core performance is moderate, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1818.28. Memory subsystem performance is highly competitive, highlighted by a top-tier PassMark memory score of 2948.8, though uncached large-block read and write speeds remain average at 120.27 GB/sec and 58.6 GB/sec respectively.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the arm64 architecture delivers high resource density and strong multi-threaded performance relative to its hardware profile, making it a viable alternative to traditional x86 architectures for parallelizable workloads. The instance is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, static web serving, and lightweight machine learning inference tasks, such as prompt processing and text generation on smaller models.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized instance powered by a 32-core Alibaba YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. Lacking hyperthreading, its 32 dedicated physical cores deliver highly predictable performance. The instance features 64.0 GB of RAM, a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage. Benchmarks highlight strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core performance and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression both ranking in the top 25%. Additionally, its memory subsystem achieves a top-tier PassMark memory score. Qualitatively, the custom arm64 architecture offers high compute density and efficiency for parallel workloads. The ecs.c8y.8xlarge is optimized for multi-threaded applications, database operations, static web serving, and lightweight machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.8xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated YiTian710 cores, 64 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and memory benchmark performance.

tagline: An arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring thirty-two dedicated cores and high-bandwidth memory for efficient multi-threaded workloads.

Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM and 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong multi-core performance in stress-ng and bzip3 decompression benchmarks
Top-tier PassMark memory score indicating highly efficient memory subsystem performance
No local storage bundled, requiring external block storage volumes
Optimized for multi-threaded applications, database operations, and static web serving
